---
url: https://www.lindy.ai
---

# Lindy – The Ultimate AI Assistant For Work

Lindy – The Ultimate AI Assistant For Work

Your assistant for sorting email.scheduling.drafting replies.meetings.taking notes.
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Lindy helps run your day like a world-class executive assistant.

![](data:image/png;base64,)                      ![](data:image/png;base64,) ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63e15df811f9df22b231e58f/69c68ffd9ec705529eeb2ad5_google-cal-icon.avif) ![](data:image/png;base64,) ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63e15df811f9df22b231e58f/69c68ffdb28daeff6a481aee_IMessage_logo%201.avif) ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63e15df811f9df22b231e58f/69c68ffda43943bf13132f82_slack-icon.avif) ![](data:image/png;base64,) ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63e15df811f9df22b231e58f/69c69cd035dc28e771465f7b_Group%201713659187.avif) ![](data:image/png;base64,) ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63e15df811f9df22b231e58f/69c69cd0fd18096c369f09f1_Group%201713659185.avif) ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63e15df811f9df22b231e58f/69c69cd026b23a293e0028fe_Group%201713659184.avif) ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63e15df811f9df22b231e58f/69c69cd0ad9e9e7d7afdeae1_Group%201713659183.avif) ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63e15df811f9df22b231e58f/69c69cd0321cafd5dcf4a33f_Group%201713659178.avif) ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63e15df811f9df22b231e58f/69c69cd033841341db7fb222_Group%201713659179.avif) ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63e15df811f9df22b231e58f/69c69cd051f5c9dc9bf09920_Group%201713659180.avif) ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63e15df811f9df22b231e58f/69c69cd0e9068001ff7c3362_Group%201713659181.avif) ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63e15df811f9df22b231e58f/69c69cd07e28b26b6caa66b4_Group%201713659182.avif)

Used in the world’s leading organizations

EMAIL TRIAGE & DRAFTING

### Your inbox, organized. Your replies, drafted.

Lindy surfaces what matters, filters out what doesn’t, and drafts replies in your voice. Just review and send.

![Email triage](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

MEETING SCHEDULING

### Your meetings, scheduled.

Lindy finds a time that works, sends the invite, and reschedules when plans change. No more back-and-forth.

![Email drafting](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

MEETING PREP & RECORDING

### Every meeting prepped, recorded, and followed up.

Lindy briefs you before the call, takes notes during, and sends the recap and action items after.

![Meeting follow-up](data:image/png;base64,)

See how Lindy eliminates workday chaos
--------------------------------------

![See how Lindy eliminates workday chaos](data:image/jpeg;base64,) 

Watch demo

See how Lindy canstreamline your work day.
------------------------------------------

                  ![Woman portrait](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

ERIC LOHELA, DIRECTOR

![logo of Interlaced.io](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63e15df811f9df22b231e58f/69a8ccc5e6e6bfb78846d4d2_slalom.avif)

Link Gmail or Outlook. Lindy starts organizing in under 60 seconds.

The more you use it, the better it gets. Drafts, scheduling, priorities — all tuned to you.

Inbox managed. Meetings handled. Two hours back every day.

![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

Greg Isenberg

@gregisenberg

This feels like the most human assistant I’ve seen in any product. You need to use it to really see it.

![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

Zain Kahn

@heykahn

If you're still doing your own email, scheduling, or customer support…you're working like it's 2015.

![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

Hasan Toor

@hasantoxr

🚨BREAKING: Lindy AI just killed the virtual assistant industry. Lindy AI just dropped and it works 24/7

![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

Andrew Wilkinson

@awilkinson

Excited for this. TLDR: Openclaw without the security nightmare.

![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

Lenny Rachitsky

@lennysan

Built a life-changing @getlindy agent in 10 mins 👌

![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

Deedy

@deedydas

I use ~5 AI agents regularly that saves me many hours and well over $10k. The best part is I didn't have to build these from scratch.

![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

Linus Ekenstam

@LinusEkenstam

Lindy is ChatGPT w access to all your apps, so it can:  
 - manage your email & calendar   
 - help you prospect / recruit   
 - record & summarize your mtgs

![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

Chase Dimond

@ecomchasedimond

While you're stuck in meetings, someone just automated their entire follow-up process with @getlindy.

![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

Kalsoom (ghotai)

@AIwithGhotai

I used to spend 4 hours daily on emails, scheduling, and admin tasks. Lindy AI now handles all of this in 8 minutes while I sleep. I gained 28 hours per week to focus on revenue-generating work. My productivity increased 400% in 30 days.

![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

Alex Reibman

@AlexReibman

Schedule events, draft emails, summarize meetings, book appointments, and more. Replace your executive assistant with an AI agent.
